programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: George Thorogood & The Destroyers: Live at Montreux 2013
programme.desc: In a career that stretches back to the mid-seventies, Thorogood and his band have released 16 albums with worldwide sales in excess of 15 million. 2013 saw George & The Destroyers make their long overdue debut at the legendary Montreux Jazz Festival.

programme.title: Def Leppard - Hysteria At The O2
programme.desc: Sheffield's finest make their long-awaited debut at London's O2m Arena in November 2018. Marking the 31st anniversary of Hysteria they played the whole of the ground breaking album in chronological order featuring hits like Pour Some Sugar on Me, Ani...

programme.title: Metallica - Orion Festival: Tour Through the Never
programme.desc: Filmed at Orion Festival, Atlantic City, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Metallica featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'One', 'Master Of Puppets', 'Sad But True' and more.

programme.title: Motörhead - Rock Im Park
programme.desc: Rock im Park is a music festival that takes place in Nuremberg, Germany, lasting three days; featuring: Motörhead.

programme.title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring and Rock Im Park are annual music festivals at the Nürburgring racetrack in western Germany; Depeche Mode performs at the event.

programme.title: Imagine Dragons - Live At The Moody Theater
programme.desc: Filmed at The Moody Theater, Texas, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Imagine Dragons featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'Demons', 'Radioactive' and many more.

programme.title: Avril Lavigne - Live in Calgary
programme.desc: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album The Best Damn Thing, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide.

programme.title: Jack White - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Keith Richards - Under Review
programme.desc: Documentary featuring exclusive interviews, obscure footage and seldom seen photographs.

programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The RZA, The GZA, 'Ol Dirty Bastard, Inspectah Deck, Raekwon The Chef, U-God, Ghostface Killah, Cappadonna, Masta Killa and Method Man cut a song - "Protect Ya Neck" - and the world hasn't been the same since.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Wu-Tang Clan's underground rap single starts to blow up and business moved fast. Despite their success, things were still going on back home in the projects that affected their friends and family — the Wu weren't immune to it. Nor were they bulletproof.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Wale enlightens us on his passion for his career which results in many sleepness nights. T-Pain gives an insider's view of his travels and why he creates a plethora of music.

programme.title: Beyonce: Beyond the Glam
programme.desc: Beyoncé is a true global mega star and is synonymous with talent and success. She is a pop sensation, winning over 16 Grammy Awards, a Hollywood actress and a breakout fashion designer.

programme.title: Beyonce: On Top
programme.desc: Beyonce Knowles is without a doubt one of the biggest pop stars the world has ever seen. Her powerful female image has inspired millions all around the globe and her lyrics have helped spread the message of solidarity, independence and positivity.

programme.title: Beyonce & Jay-Z: Power Love
programme.desc: A merger of megastar music. Discover the story of multi-genre performer and fashion promoter, Beyonce Knowles sand the world's first hip hop billionaire, Jay-Z.

programme.title: Beyonce: Queen B
programme.desc: One of the most recognizable figures in contemporary music, Beyoncé rose to fame as the central member of pop-R&B group Destiny's Child before embarking on a multi-platinum, record-breaking solo career in 2001.

programme.title: Beyoncé: Fierce and Fabulous
programme.desc: The multi-platinum award winning recording artist has recently released her latest studio album, self titled Beyonce. Beyonce first captured the public's eye when she was the lead singer in Destiny's child.

programme.title: Hip Hop Don't Stop
programme.desc: This film gives us the definitive chronicle of hip-hop from its beginnings. See the evolution of music with vintage footage, live performances, and exclusive interviews with hip hop legends

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Symba, a rapper from The Bay Area, tells his life story and how he ultimately landed a deal with Atlantic Records and his first national tour.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on Big Boss Vette, a rapper from St. Louis. It depicts Vette's life of trials and tribulations, hitting rock bottom and bouncing back to sky high success.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The third episode tells the story of known battle rapper, Hitman Holla. Growing up in the dangerous city of St. Louis, rising to fame on the television show Wild 'n Out, and taking his music career beyond battle rapping.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode of Future Superstar focuses on punk rock rapper Klondike Blonde. Raised by a single father, Klondike discovered her love for music at a young age. After moving to Atlanta, she shortly rose to fame. This is her story.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: JD is a triple-threat entertainer who rose to fame in commercials and then skyrocketed when he became the voice of Young Simba in the Lion King remake. Raw talent and a genuine passion for his craft make JD a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Tina Turner: Simply the Best
programme.desc: The odds were against her. Learn how singer Tina Turner reached super-stardom with her high energy and gravelly voice and prevailed as the "Queen of Rock 'n' Roll". Learn how Tina prevailed then reached solo superstardom with songs like "Private Dancer".

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A regal vista on canvas, Bob Ross paints incredible mountains and waterfall enclosed by proud evergreens and mossy cliffs.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's a cold, cold winter day but Bob Ross offers a warm and roomy barn as refuge from the snowy blanket covering the farm.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a nice walk with Bob Ross along a peacefully flowing river and enjoy a view of gorgeous amethyst mountains and stately trees in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a pleasant walk through the forest with Bob Ross and breathe in that crisp, rain-freshened air - but be careful of those puddles!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover what autumn beauty unfolds as those exotic orange and gold colors appear on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Venture down a well-traveled pathway with Bob Ross, into this gorgeous Autumn landscape of glorious colors, weather worn fence and trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a gorgeous late-afternoon mountain masterpiece by Bob Ross -- breathtaking purples skies, defined evergreens, and smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint Bob Ross shanty and experience the tranquility of mysterious distant mountains and an inviting pond just outside the door.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic mountains reign over a colorful seascape as Bob Ross creates one of the most challenging masterpieces ever painted in a half-hour.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A frozen pond and snow drifts would be so cold, except for the warm rich sky and late autumn foliage in this Bob Ross painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old gnarly tree and snow-capped fence to mark the line between home and the edge of the winter blanketed forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch guest artist Steve Ross paint an incredibly beautiful, bright and happy mountain scene with fabulous evergreens and foothills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Hike into the expanse of wilderness with Bob Ross and happen upon a quaint little home sitting among softly blowing meadow grasses.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Elegant mountain lake, silent and still, reflecting the natural beauty of leafy trees and grasses all around - a pretty Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow along with Bob Ross as he takes you into the incredible beauty of the dry lands. A unique oval painting for beginners and accomplished artists as well.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: For as far as the eye can see -- beautiful rolling hills, birch trees and soft watery reflections; undoubtedly guest artist Steve Ross at his finest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Team up with Bob Ross and travel back to the days of swimming in that lovely secluded river bend; bring back memories of a forgotten time.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Steve Ross extends an invitation to join him on the banks of a crystal loch for a view of majestic mountain peaks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A mellow background gives way to chunky rock formations, trickling waterways, and happy trees in this Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A partially blackened canvas is all you need to start creating this dark, mood-filled misty waterfall scene with artist Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Just a few quick, color-filled strokes and a little shanty with crisp evergreens and bright meadow appear - paint with Bob Ross!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a painting excursion along this beautiful scenic river - who knows what abundance of nature's wealth lies beyond!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Towering Bob Ross mountains and a frosty moonlit landscape are the setting of Nicholas Hankins old trapper's cabin.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into a snow-covered forest with Bob Ross, a scene that's been gently warmed by the beauty of winter's rustic touches of color.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross presents a really unique idea using black gesso -- two lovely paintings in one -- summer and winter scenes overlapping on the same canvas!

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Home-Corned Beef with Vegetables, Ultimate Snickerdoodles; tasting of sherry vinegar

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Gingerbread Layer Cake, Sticky Toffee Pudding Cakes; review of stovetop kettles

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boston Cream Pie, Chocolate Sheet Cake with Milk Chocolate Frosting; review of silicone spatulas

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Brunch Burgers, Browned Butter Chocolate Chunk Muffins; review of cooking sprays

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lan Lam and Bridget cook Dan Dan Mian. Adam Ried reviews tools. Dan Souza, Julia make Shīzi Tóu."

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Struffoli, Pistachio-Spice Biscotti; tasting of single origin chocolate

programme.title: Julia At Home
programme.desc: Lan shows us that food sticking to the pan can give us more flavor. We also learn about pan sauces.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Olive Oil Cake, Baklava

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Stellar versions of bistro classics like French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we show how a few easy tricks can give an old standby, like roast chicken, a new lift.
